title: Bible Verse Splashes!
description: Resource Pack that turns your Splashes into Bible Verses!
body:
# **This Resource Pack makes your splashes Bible Verses!**

## What does this do?:
- **It turns the yellow text on the main menu (splashes) into Bible Verses!**

## Can I request any verses or any version?
- **Of course, message me on discord and i'll try to answer as soon as possible!**


## **NOTE: IF YOU FIND ANY BUGS OR GLITCHES CONTACT ME, CHECK MY PROFILE DESCRIPTION FOR CONTACT INFORMATION**
